---
title-block-banner: "#1B2A4A"
title-block-banner-color: "white"
toc: false
format:
  html:
    subtitle: "A practical, illustrated guide for sub-county policy analysis"
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

# Creating Local-Level Geographic Datasets {#cover-title .unnumbered}

::: {.cover-hero}
![](figures/map_bivariate.png){fig-alt="Bivariate map of income by broadband speed across Arlington's 62 civic associations" width=100%}

[Digital equity across Arlington's 62 civic associations: median household income against broadband download speed.]{.cover-hero-caption}
:::

::: {.cover-sponsor}
[Project sponsor]{.cover-sponsor-label}

![](figures/partners-mclogo.png){fig-alt="Mastercard Center for Inclusive Growth" width=260}
:::

:::

::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
![](figures/map_bivariate.png){fig-alt="Bivariate map of income by broadband speed across Arlington's 62 civic associations" width=80% fig-align="center"}

\begin{center}
\itshape\small Digital equity across Arlington's 62 civic associations: median household income against broadband download speed.
\end{center}
:::
